item.title: Osmo Action 4
item.shortDescription: Rugged, waterproof action camera with excellent stabilization. Captures adventures without turning the moment into a production.
item.description: An action camera recommendation for travel, adventures, and POV capture.
item.verdict: The pocket camera that makes the best shots actually happen.
item.whyItStayed: Rugged, waterproof, and stabilized enough that the footage looks intentional instead of accidental.
item.howIUseIt: Adventures, travel, POV clips, and the handheld moments where a phone is not the right tool.
item.replaced: Shaky phone footage and shots I kept meaning to get but never did.
item.summary: Rugged, waterproof action camera with excellent stabilization. Captures adventures without turning the moment into a production.
